title: Intense Creamy Syrian Milk Biryani
description: A dense and creamy Syrian dish featuring semi-skimmed milk and double-rise-bread, perfect for a hangover cure or a satisfying meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Soak the basmati rice in water for 30 minutes, then drain and set aside.
Heat the ghee in a large pan over medium heat and saute the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the cumin seeds and salt, and stir for 1 minute.
Add the cubed bread and stir until the bread is toasted and fragrant.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked rice, toasted bread mixture, and semi-skimmed milk, and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
